texto: Television's compelling power is its immediacy . .. this immediacy feeds the politics of emotions gut reactions and impressions rather than the politics of logic facts and reason it emphasizes personality rather than issues.
explicacao: Citação de Hedrick Smith sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Television's compelling power is its immediacy . .. this immediacy feeds the politics of emotions…” articula reflexao, television, immediacy em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
